summary: Highly motivated and detail-oriented Software Engineer with a strong foundation in MERN stack development and cloud infrastructure. Proven track record of building robust web applications, optimizing database performance, and collaborating in agile teams to deliver scalable software solutions.

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering

projects.title: E-Commerce Billing Dashboard
description: Developed a full-stack billing software using MERN Stack with React, Node.js, and MongoDB.
Integrated JWT authentication and role-based access control, securing sensitive user data.
Reduced manual billing effort by 70% through automated invoicing and inventory synchronization.

responsibilities: Assisted in developing client-side dashboard panels using React.js and Redux.
Participated in daily standups and agile sprints, contributing to feature planning and bug fixes.

description: Collaborated on designing backend microservices in Node.js and Express.
Improved overall application loading latency by 25% by implementing efficient database queries and caching.
